scheme.scheme_name: HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth
scheme.benchmark: CRISIL Short Duration Debt A-II Index

facts.taxation: Returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab.

sections.title: Overview
sections.text: HDFC Short Term Debt Fund is a Short Duration Debt mutual fund offered by HDFC Mutual Fund. Its riskometer classification is Moderately Low. Its benchmark index is CRISIL Short Duration Debt A-II Index. The fund manager is Anil Bamboli. It was launched on 01-Jan-2013. Its ISIN is INF179K01YM7.

sections.title: Fees and Charges
sections.text: The expense ratio of HDFC Short Term Debt Fund is 0.39%. The exit load is: Nil. Stamp duty is 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020).

sections.title: Investment Limits
sections.text: The minimum SIP investment is ₹100. The minimum lumpsum (one-time) investment is ₹100. The minimum additional investment is ₹100. The minimum withdrawal amount is ₹100. Lock-in: No lock-in period. SIP investment is allowed.

sections.title: Taxation
sections.text: Taxation for HDFC Short Term Debt Fund (category: Debt): Returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab.

sections.title: Fund Size and NAV
sections.text: The assets under management (AUM) is approximately ₹14,864.06 crore. The latest NAV is ₹35.2043 as of 30-Jun-2026.

sections.title: Fund House and Registrar
sections.text: The registrar and transfer agent (RTA) for HDFC Short Term Debt Fund is CAMS. The AMC (HDFC Mutual Fund) registered address is "HDFC House", 2nd Floor, H. T. Parekh Marg, 165-166, BackbayReclamation, Churchgate Mumbai 400020.

sections.title: Scheme Description
sections.text: The scheme seeks to generate regular income through investment in debt securities and money market instruments.
